settings.title: Marketplace role
settings.text: The marketplace presents products, packaged opportunities, listing pathways, review materials, and enquiry routes. Each pathway may have separate terms or requirements.

settings.title: Accuracy and review
settings.text: Buyers and sellers should check all relevant information, clarify assumptions, and make decisions based on the specific opportunity and documents provided.

settings.title: Next steps vary
settings.text: Some items can be purchased directly, while others require enquiry, qualification, review, seller follow-up, or separate agreement.

settings.heading: Marketplace terms and participation notes
settings.text: This page provides marketplace-specific expectations for buyers, sellers, enquiries, listed opportunities, information accuracy, and next-step pathways.
